title: Master YAML Shared Header
description: Validates the top-level wrapper of master.yaml including schema_version, header, cycles[], and decision_log[]. Per spec § 4.1, § 12.2, § 12.4. Header fields are advisory; last-writer-wins on last_touched_* is acceptable per § 6.3 C1.

schema_version.description: Semver string for the shared header contract. All 4 skills must update in lock-step on a header bump per § 12.4.

header.description: Shared org-level metadata. Any skill may write; last-writer-wins on advisory fields.

org_slug.description: Canonical org slug. Must match _orgs/index.yaml entry per § 3.

created_date.description: ISO 8601 date when master.yaml was first created for this org.

created_by_skill.description: The skill that created this master.yaml. v2 uses the unified `comp` orchestrator (which dispatches to internal modes — see § 5).

last_touched_date.description: ISO 8601 date. Updated on every /init. Advisory — last-writer-wins.

last_touched_by_skill.description: Skill that last touched this master.yaml. v2 uses `comp`. Advisory — last-writer-wins.

primary_language.description: Default language for artifacts produced for this org. Defaults to fr-ca per Bill 96 / Quebec posture.

display_name.description: Optional. Human-readable org name for tree view rendering.

notes.description: Optional. Operator free-text notes about this org.

active_skills.description: Registry of skills that have ever run /init for this org. Auto-maintained per § 8.

asset_pointers.description: Paths into the existing v1 Drive layout that this skill owns for this org.

cycles.description: Cycle index. Auto-maintained on /init and /close-cycle per § 4.1.

decision_log.description: Append-only audit trail. Any skill appends; no skill mutates prior entries per § 6.3.

advisor.description: Federated section owned exclusively by compensation-advisor. See master-advisor-section.schema.json.

comms.description: Federated section owned exclusively by comp-comms-builder. See master-comms-section.schema.json.

training.description: Federated section owned exclusively by comp-training-designer. See master-training-section.schema.json.

transformer.description: Federated section owned exclusively by comp-team-transformer. See master-transformer-section.schema.json.

decision_log.summary: master.yaml created for acme by compensation-advisor. Operator confirmed slug; no fuzzy-match conflicts found.
